invariant: A public factual result is VERIFIED with proof or ABSTAINED with no draft text or citations.
root_cause: Proof failure is represented as verified=false metadata while the generated text is still deliverable; the benchmark duplicates and overrides that policy.
scope: Add an explicit VERIFIED or ABSTAINED answer status while retaining the legacy verified field additively.
Centralize abstention construction so failed proof cannot retain draft text, citations, confidence, or unverified_claims.
Reject verify=false at direct canonical answer entry points and force public transports to use verification.
Make no-candidate, low-proof, CoVe, span, form, numeric, and NLI failures abstain regardless of retrieval coverage.
Normalize exact-cache, semantic-cache, structured, reflex, and hybrid answers before reconsolidation or serialization.
Route the fixed benchmark reader through canonical Engine orchestration and remove coverage-backed and dense unverified delivery behavior.
Keep structured failed derivations only as explicitly typed diagnostic drafts, not answer fields.
Prepare the same typed reader seam for a subsequent NotebookLM UntrustedDraft integration.
out_of_scope: No age-ranking, bi-temporal, scope-schema, immutable-ledger, or cloud changes in this diff.
No benchmark prompt, judge, sample, or gold changes.

safety: Zero public Answer objects with verified=false and non-abstention factual text.
Every ABSTAINED result has zero citations, zero confidence, and zero unverified_claims.
Every VERIFIED result retains at least one entailed citation.
verify=false cannot bypass the canonical boundary.
Benchmark product rows contain zero unverified_answered outputs by construction.
regression: All previously verified-correct burned rows remain mechanically unchanged by status projection.
Existing verified-answer unit tests retain answer text and proof references.
replay: Mechanically project all 57 historical unverified_answered rows to abstentions without editing source JSONL.
Report raw judged-correct loss separately from verified-correct preservation.
Run targeted offline tests, then the full offline suite if targeted tests pass.

rollback: Revert the source diff only; retain the pre-fix evidence and failed test/replay artifacts. Never restore unverified delivery as a compatibility mode.
